content_body:
My boyfriend rented this cabin as a total surprise for my birthday. When we arrived we were totally surprised by how beautiful and peaceful this place was. I can't wait to see what this weekend holds! We will definitely be back! Hands down the best birthday ever! ~Brittiny

So I'm the awesome boyfriend mentioned above... :) She loves this place! I also almost caught the prettiest rainbow trout I've ever seen. It had to be about 12.5 inches long and 15lbs. But he broke my line and got away! Still an awesome experience. Casino was fun too! ~Reginald
title: Best Birthday Ever!
